name: Newcastle North
description:
Newcastle North covers the areas of Bradwell, Porthill, Wolstanton and May Bank, all small villages situated to the north of Newcastle-under-Lyme. Bradwell boasts a small shopping area and several churches and local officers are based within the Bradwell area at the community centre and this centre plays hosts to over 1,000 local people per week for various activities.

Wolstanton and Porthill are former mining communities but now there is an industrial park with several nationwide stores. Across the area there is now a different thriving business community with many local schools and a number of different churches of varying denominations.

There is good transport network surrounded by major link roads to local towns and also the M6 motorway.
